narrative:
Brecksville-Broadview Hts City Sd city school district has 20,203 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.3% D−R vs -10.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
